name: Garlic Chicken Provencal Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 16 oz cans Italian plum tomatoes, undrained, cut into pieces
1 cup Dry white wine or water
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt 2 tablespoons butter in a Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
2. Add onion and cook, stirring occasionally, for 3 to 5 minutes or until softened. Remove from pan; set aside.
3. In the same Dutch oven, melt 1/4 cup butter. Add chicken and cook for 8 to 10 minutes or until golden brown, turning once.
4. Add tomatoes, wine, and reserved onion. Bring to a boil.
5. Reduce heat and simmer uncovered for 10 to 15 minutes or until chicken is no longer pink.
6. Stir in frozen vegetables and pasta. Bring to a boil.
7. Reduce heat and simmer for 3 to 5 minutes or until vegetables are crisp-tender.
8. To serve, place one chicken breast half in each of 4 large shallow soup bowls. Ladle hot soup over the chicken.
9. Garnish with Parmesan cheese and parsley.
